# Panasonic Official Documentation Index

This file indexes official Panasonic documentation for FP-series PLCs and Control FPWIN Pro programming software.

## Primary Documentation Sources

### Panasonic Industry Automation Controls
- Main portal: https://industry.panasonic.com/global/en/downloads
- European portal: https://industry.panasonic.eu/products/automation-devices-solutions/programmable-logic-controllers-plc/

### Control FPWIN Pro Documentation

#### Control FPWIN Pro Programming Manual
- Document Number: ACGM0313V5EN
- PDF: https://mediap.industry.panasonic.eu/assets/download-files/import/mn_63489_0050_en_fpwinpro_programming.pdf
- Size: 62 MB
- Latest version: February 28, 2025
- Covers:
  - All IEC 61131-3 programming languages (LD, FBD, IL, ST, SFC)
  - Project structure and POUs
  - Data types and variables
  - Debugging and simulation

#### Control FPWIN Pro Reference Manual
- Document Number: ACGM0142V50END
- PDF: https://ac-blog.panasonic.co.jp/hubfs/PLC/ACGM0142V50END.pdf
- Covers:
  - Detailed function reference
  - System registers and special relays
  - Communication parameters
  - Memory area assignment

#### Control FPWIN Pro7 Introduction Guidance
- PDF: https://www.smartautomation.rs/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/fpwinpro7_guide_e.pdf
- Quick start guide for FPWIN Pro 7
- Covers basic project setup and programming

### FP Series Hardware Manuals

#### FP Series Programming Manual
- Covers: FP0, FP-e, FPΣ (Sigma), FP-X, FP2/2SH series
- Available from Panasonic download center

#### FPΣ User's Manual
- Document: fpsigma-um_c.pdf
- Size: 9.1 MB
- Last updated: August 22, 2011

## Controller Families

### FP0 Series
- Ultra-compact, entry-level PLC
- 10-32 I/O points
- Cost-effective for simple applications

### FP-X Series
- Compact, high-performance PLC
- Built-in Ethernet and USB
- Expandable I/O

### FPΣ (Sigma) Series
- Mid-range modular PLC
- High-speed processing
- Extensive I/O expansion

### FP2/2SH Series
- Legacy modular PLC (discontinued but still supported)
- Large installed base

### FP0H Series
- Compact PLC with integrated motion control
- RTEX (Real-Time Express) motion bus support

## Programming Software

### Control FPWIN Pro
- **Used for**: All FP-series PLCs
- **Languages**: Full IEC 61131-3 compliance
  - Ladder Diagram (LD)
  - Function Block Diagram (FBD)
  - Instruction List (IL)
  - Structured Text (ST)
  - Sequential Function Chart (SFC)
- **Features**:
  - Integrated simulation
  - Online debugging
  - Cross-reference lists
  - DUT (Data Unit Type) support

### Control FPWIN Pro7
- Latest version of FPWIN Pro
- Enhanced user interface
- Improved library management
- Motion control libraries for MINAS servo drives

## Key Features

### IEC 61131-3 Compliance
- Full support for all five programming languages
- Standard data types and POUs
- Portable code across different FP series

### Motion Control Integration
- Libraries for MINAS A5N/A6N servo drives
- RTEX (Real-Time Express) motion bus
- Pulse train output for stepper motors

### Communication Libraries
- IEC 60870-5 standard protocol library
- Modbus, EtherNet/IP support
- Serial and Ethernet communication

## Evidence Priority

When answering Panasonic-specific questions, use sources in this order:
1. Official Panasonic manuals (Control FPWIN Pro Programming Manual, Reference Manual)
2. Panasonic download center resources
3. IEC 61131-3 standards
4. Community resources (lowest priority)
